sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Wagon System
special_mechanics.description: Party management system allowing player to choose which characters are used in battle. The wagon can be seen as a precursor to later party management systems.

special_mechanics.name: Travel Vehicles
special_mechanics.description: Multiple traversal methods including ship and hot air balloon for world map navigation

special_mechanics.name: Travel Doors
special_mechanics.description: Doors that allow the party to move great distances on the world map with minimal travel time

tier_notes: Tier 2: RPG with no documented movement physics parameters in available sources. Game focuses on turn-based combat and story rather than character movement mechanics. Sources contain ROM mapping, debug features, and unused content information but no quantified physics values.
